summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MealTalks landing page fourth iteration. All requested features working perfectly: hero section uses single combined phone mockup (vector 2.png) with blob background, all 6 feature icons use Figma images including s6.png for 'Support for Local Foods' (no fallback SVGs), footer app store buttons are now full-size matching hero buttons with large icons, all images load correctly, smooth scrolling, and responsive on mobile/desktop.
passed_tests: Hero section uses correct combined phone mockup image (vector 2.png) with blob background (Vector.png)
All 6 feature cards use correct Figma icon images (s1.png through s6.png) with no fallback SVGs
6th feature 'Support for Local Foods' now uses s6.png instead of fallback globe SVG
Footer App Store and Google Play buttons are full-size (48px height, same as hero)
Both hero and footer buttons use large icons (w-7 h-7) with proper text alignment
All 12 images load successfully without errors (hero, blob, feature icons, mockups, testimonials)
Page scrolls smoothly through all sections (hero, features, footer)
Responsive design works correctly on mobile (390px) and desktop (1920px)
All buttons are clickable and interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
